title: Some states have scrapeable endpoints:
content:
Some states have scrapeable endpoints:
UCC State Examples
  • Delaware UCChttps://icis.corp.delaware.gov/Ecorp/EntitySearch/NameSearch.aspx
  • Texas SOSDirect (paid access)https://www.sos.state.tx.us/corp/sosda/index.shtml
  • Florida UCChttps://dos.myflorida.com/sunbiz/search/
API Keys:None — scraping only (use BeautifulSoup, Puppeteer, or Playwright)

14. Financial APIs (Optional for revenue estimation)
Codat
  • Purpose: pulls accounting data from QuickBooks, Xero
  • API Key: YOUR_CODAT_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs: https://docs.codat.io/
Plaid
  • Purpose: bank transaction verification
  • API Key: YOUR_PLAID_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs: https://plaid.com/docs/

15. Email Delivery APIs (for sending outreach)
SendGrid
  • API Key: YOUR_SENDGRID_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs: https://docs.sendgrid.com/
Mailgun
  • API Key: YOUR_MAILGUN_API_KEY_HERE
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 22 (chunk 22/32)
